title: 无标题文章
summary: It’s weird but for Switch 1 I was 80% of the time in portable mode, I found the joycons detached uncomfortable so Pro Controller on TV. Switch 2 I find portable mode uncomfortable so 99% time docked, but since joycons are bigger they are more comfortable so that’s what I use.
content: It’s weird but for Switch 1 I was 80% of the time in portable mode, I found the joycons detached uncomfortable so Pro Controller on TV. Switch 2 I find portable mode uncomfortable so 99% time docked, but since joycons are bigger they are more comfortable so that’s what I use.
